reviews.review_msg: One of the most genuine professors at SFU. His lectures are a bit slow, but its due to his inexperience, so expect that to get better. He is extremely knowledgeable, understanding, and helpful. One of the best Engineering professors!
Great professor who really cares. kinda unconfident in lectures, but if you ask questions, he really knows the subjects. My gooning GOAT

Great prof, bit of a hiccup with handing out lab kits at the beginning of the semester which pushed back assignments, but was not entirely his fault. Was really understanding of pushing back deadlines because we had other assignments/exams do at the same time. 100% would take again.
